data.description: Expert-led training for SolarWinds, Securden, Quest, and Ivanti platforms. SCP certification prep, hands-on labs, and instructor-led courses across Asia.
data.html:
NOW ENROLLING — Q2 2026

Advance Your IT Career.
Get Certified.

iTrust Academy delivers expert-led, hands-on training across SolarWinds, Securden, Quest, and Ivanti — equipping IT professionals across Asia with the skills and certifications employers demand.

4
Technology Vendors
5+
Training Programs
Asia-Wide
Training Coverage
SCP
Certification Prep
AUTHORIZED TRAINING PARTNER

Training Across Leading IT Platforms

SolarWinds

Enterprise observability, network monitoring, database performance, and ITSM. SolarWinds Certified Instructors delivering official SolarWinds Academy curriculum. SCP exam vouchers included.

Securden

Unified Privileged Access Management for credential security, session monitoring, and compliance. Training by Securden Authorized Trainers.

Quest

IT management, Active Directory security, migration, and data protection. Authorized training for Quest product deployment.

Ivanti

Endpoint management, ITSM, and security for the modern digital workplace. Authorized Ivanti platform training.

WHY CHOOSE US

Training That Gets Results

🎓
Vendor-Certified Instructors
SolarWinds courses led by SolarWinds Certified Instructors. Each vendor program meets that vendor's specific qualification requirements.
🖥️
Hands-On Lab Environments
Every course includes dedicated lab environments tailored to each vendor's platform — real configurations, not just slides.
📋
Certification-Aligned Curriculum
SolarWinds courses align to SCP exam domains. Other vendor courses align to their respective certification paths.
🌏
Regional Expertise
Training delivered in English, Mandarin, and Bahasa Melayu across Asia.
✅
Certification Support
SolarWinds courses include SCP exam vouchers (2 attempts). Other vendors: exam prep guidance and registration assistance.
📞
Post-Training Support
Access to study materials, practice resources, and instructor Q&A across all vendor programs.
FEATURED COURSE · SOLARWINDS

SCP Observability Self-Hosted Fundamentals

This intensive 3-day program prepares IT professionals for the SolarWinds Certified Professional (SCP) Hybrid Cloud Observability Fundamentals examination. Delivered by SolarWinds Certified Instructors, this course follows the official SolarWinds Academy curriculum covering platform architecture, network discovery, node management, user customization, alerting, reporting, and troubleshooting tools.

1
Platform Architecture & Node Management
SCP Exam: Domains 1.1 (10%) + 1.2 (12%) = 22%
SolarWinds Platform architecture and deployment requirements
Network Sonar Wizard and discovery configuration
Node management: adding, editing, and deleting nodes
+3 more topics
2
Customization & User Experience
SCP Exam: Domain 1.3 (25%)
User account types: Platform, Windows, and SAML authentication
Permissions and security settings configuration
Classic views vs modern dashboards and widgets
+3 more topics
3
Alerts, Reports & Troubleshooting Tools
SCP Exam: Domains 1.4 (20%) + 1.5 (20%) + 1.6 (13%) = 53%
Alert fundamentals: trigger conditions, reset conditions, and actions
AlertStack, anomaly-based alerts, and maintenance mode
Creating and scheduling custom reports with SWQL
+4 more topics
SCP EXAM DOMAINS
Platform Architecture & Deployment
10%
Day 1
Node Management
12%
Day 1
Customization & User Experience
25%
Day 2
Alerts
20%
Day 3
Reports
20%
Day 3
Troubleshooting Tools
13%
Day 3
WHAT'S INCLUDED
3 days of training by a SolarWinds Certified Instructor
Official SolarWinds Academy curriculum
Hands-on lab environment access
HCO Fundamentals Study Guide & 250 practice questions
SCP exam voucher (2 attempts included)
Certificate of completion
